---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt'
agent: Instructions-Generator
---

Take the information below and generate an agent instructions .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a .md file provided, use that, otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise and not too long, and make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference the new /docs .md file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
